matches.x: CHAPTER IT. The victorious armies against Nineveh. H* that dasheth in pieces.is come up before thy face; keep the munition, watch the way, make thy loins strong, fortify thy power mightily...

feelings of fear and confusion when the city is being destroyed. He pictures blood and slaughter; he sees the women ravished and the city spoiled. "The heart melteth, and the knees smite together, and much pain is in all loins, and all the faces of them all gather blackness (appear troubled)" 2:10, Nahum asks a question in sarcasm: "Where is the dwelling of the lions ."[Assyria's Capital] (2:11),…

JUDAH IS A LION’S WHELP. Jacob compared Judah to a small lion’s whelp, to a type of whelp that grows into a lion.57The Hebrew reads, gur aryeh. Gur (whelp) can be applied to any young animal. I.E. points out that gur (whelp) aryeh (lion) means a gur that grows up to be a lion, that is, a gur of the lion family (Cherez). The comparative caf (meaning like) has been omitted,58Scripture reads: Judah…
